scope: Google Search Console only (rankings, impressions, position derived from 11 GSC snapshots 2026-05-07 -> 2026-06-04, joined to the 67-keyword master list). Competitor #1-blocker analysis and AI-visibility remain manual and are intentionally NOT auto-generated here.
wins: bariatric surgery counseling san antonio holds #1 (up from 45.3, delta +44.3) and bariatric surgery counseling (national) sits at #4 (delta +17.0) — the bariatric-surgery cluster is BCC's strongest lane right now (both single-/low-impression, so directional).
weight loss therapy (national) is the best impression-backed win: position 6.9 on page 1 with 11 impressions, delta +35.8 from 42.8 — real volume at a page-1 slot, not a one-impression blip.

Three core local terms re-entered the #2-#3 tier: weight loss counseling san antonio @ #2 (delta +44.1), emotional eating therapy san antonio @ #3 (delta +28.5), weight management therapist san antonio @ #4 (delta +48.7) — each on 1 impression, so confirm with a second snapshot.

Top impression earners are both at page-1 positions: the hydration blog (2,338 impressions @ pos 8.2, 7 clicks) and the weight-loss-medications/Wegovy-Ozempic-Zepbound blog (2,234 impressions @ pos 10.1) — the bulk of BCC's visibility lives on these two posts.
Position distribution improved vs. the 2026-06-03 run: #4-10 went 3 -> 4 and #11-20 went 2 -> 3, while 21+ shrank from 12 to 7.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage is 18 of 67 tracked KEYWORDS with GSC impressions; 49 of 67 KEYWORDS show none. These are KEYWORD counts, NOT page counts — many keywords share one target page, and most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages that are already live on www (a tracker-hygiene issue, not lost traffic).

Visibility is trending down across the snapshot window: impressions fell from 2,447 (2026-05-07) to 1,673 (2026-06-04, about -32%) and impression-weighted avg position drifted from 14.87 to 20.37 — fewer impressions at worse average positions.

CTR is effectively zero: 2 clicks on 1,673 impressions today (~0.12%), and the timeline never exceeds 7 clicks/day despite 1,400-2,400 daily impressions — high-impression blog content is not converting impressions into clicks.

bariatric counseling (national) is the most meaningful slip: position 27.1 with 22 impressions (the only double-digit-impression mover), delta -8.1 from 18.9 — a real commercial term losing ground on real volume. weight loss counseling (national) slid further in magnitude (-16.2 to 47.7) but on only 3 impressions.

CAVEAT: most tracked positions rest on 1-3 impressions, so single-impression rankings swing day to day and are directional only; treat the #1-#3 wins and the small negative deltas as signals to confirm, not settled facts.
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene (highest leverage): of 42 distinct target pages in keywords-master.json, 21 are staging12 URLs and 21 are live www URLs. Repoint the 21 staging-targeted targetUrls to their correct live www equivalents so GSC can match them — this alone should lift apparent keyword coverage without any new content.

Fix CTR by routing intent: add clear CTAs and internal links from the two high-impression blog posts (hydration @ 2,338 impressions pos 8.2; weight-loss-medications @ 2,234 impressions pos 10.1) into the matching service pages (GLP-1 / behavioral support, weight-management counseling) to convert page-1 impressions into clicks and consults.
Defend the core local cluster (bariatric/weight-loss/emotional-eating counseling san antonio) now holding #1-#3 — keep those pages fresh and internally linked so the gains stick across snapshots.

On-page refresh for the slipped commercial terms: prioritize bariatric counseling (national, 22 impressions, slipped to 27.1) and weight loss counseling, since these have real impressions behind the decline.

Add FAQ schema (RankMath) to core service pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility. If a staging->prod publish backlog is suspected, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes — do NOT infer a page count from keyword/GSC data.
summary: GSC-only scope: 18 of 67 tracked keywords show impressions, with visibility drifting down (impressions 2,447 -> 1,673 and avg position 14.87 -> 20.37 across the window) and near-zero CTR. The bariatric-surgery-counseling cluster and weight loss therapy (page 1, 11 impressions) are the bright spots; bariatric counseling national is the most meaningful slip. Top priority is repointing 21 stale staging targetUrls to live www so coverage reads honestly; competitor and AI-visibility sections remain manual.
